stemHtml:
Refer to CAP 698 figure 2.2.
Given the following information, calculate the ground roll distance required for a normal take-off of a Commercial Air Transport performed by a single-engined piston aeroplane.

Aerodrome pressure altitude: 2000 ft
OAT: +20°C
Take off mass: 3200 lb
Wind component: 15 kt headwind
Runway surface: 5 cm grass, dry
Aerodrome field lengths unbalanced
Correction factor: 1.2 for the runway condition
